description: One reservation CLI for OpenTable, Tock, and Resy — search all three networks at once, watch for cancellations

novel_features.name: Cross-network unified search
novel_features.description: One query across OpenTable and Tock simultaneously, ranked by relevance, earliest availability, and price band.

novel_features.name: Cross-network cancellation watcher
novel_features.description: Persistent local watcher that polls both networks for openings on your target venues and party size, with notifications and optional auto-book.

novel_features.name: Multi-venue earliest available
novel_features.description: Across a list of restaurants from either network, return the earliest open slot per venue within a time horizon.

novel_features.name: Per-restaurant change feed
novel_features.description: Show what changed at a specific venue since the last sync — new experiences, slot price moves, hours changes.
